case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANKERS INSURANCE COMPANY $20,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $303.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $20,303.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
